1. 转录服务的实现（TranscriptionService 或类似类）

1→package com.multilanglearner.service
     2→
     3→import android.app.Notification
     4→import android.app.NotificationChannel
     5→import android.app.NotificationManager
     6→import android.app.PendingIntent
     7→import android.app.Service
     8→import android.content.Context
     9→import android.content.Intent
    10→import android.os.Binder
    11→import android.os.Build
    12→import android.os.IBinder
    13→import android.util.Log
    14→import androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat
    15→import com.multilanglearner.R
    16→import com.multilanglearner.data.network.FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService
    17→import com.multilanglearner.data.network.WhisperResult
    18→import com.multilanglearner.data.store.AIConfigStore
    19→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
    20→import com.multilanglearner.domain.util.VttParser
    21→import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint
    22→import kotlinx.coroutines.*
    23→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
    24→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
    25→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
    26→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.first
    27→import kotlinx.serialization.builtins.ListSerializer
    28→import kotlinx.serialization.json.Json
    29→import java.io.File
    30→import javax.inject.Inject
    31→
    32→/**
    33→ * 转录前台服务
    34→ * 允许用户离开页面后继续转录
    35→ */
    36→@AndroidEntryPoint
    37→class TranscriptionService : Service() {
    38→    companion object {
    39→        private const val TAG = "TranscriptionService"
    40→        private const val CHANNEL_ID = "transcription_channel"
    41→        private const val CHANNEL_NAME = "视频转录"
    42→        private const val NOTIFICATION_ID = 1001
    43→
    44→        const val ACTION_START = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_START_TRANSCRIPTION"
    45→        const val ACTION_CANCEL = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_CANCEL_TRANSCRIPTION"
    46→        const val ACTION_OPEN = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_OPEN_PLAYER"
    47→
    48→        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH = "video_path"
    49→        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME = "video_name"
    50→
    51→        // 进度广播
    52→        const val ACTION_PROGRESS = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_PROGRESS"
    53→        const val EXTRA_SEGMENT = "segment"
    54→        const val EXTRA_TOTAL = "total"
    55→        const val EXTRA_PROGRESS = "progress"
    56→        const val EXTRA_MESSAGE = "message"
    57→        const val EXTRA_REMAINING = "remaining"
    58→
    59→        // 队列状态广播（新增）
    60→        const val ACTION_QUEUE_UPDATE = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_QUEUE_UPDATE"
    61→        const val EXTRA_QUEUE_SIZE = "queue_size"
    62→        const val EXTRA_CURRENT_VIDEO = "current_video"
    63→        const val EXTRA_QUEUE_LIST = "queue_list" // JSON array of video names
    64→
    65→        // 完成广播
    66→        const val ACTION_COMPLETED = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_COMPLETED"
    67→        const val EXTRA_SUCCESS = "success"
    68→        const val EXTRA_ERROR = "error"
    69→        const val EXTRA_SUBTITLE_COUNT = "subtitle_count"
    70→        const val EXTRA_DETECTED_LANG = "detected_lang"
    71→        const val EXTRA_VTT_PATH = "vtt_path"
    72→    }
    73→
    74→    @Inject
    75→    lateinit var ffmpegSegmentedService: FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService
    76→
    77→    @Inject
    78→    lateinit var aiConfigStore: AIConfigStore
    79→
    80→    private val serviceScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + Job())
    81→    private var currentJob: Job? = null
    82→
    83→    // 转录队列
    84→    private val transcriptionQueue = mutableMapOf<String, Pair<String, String>>() // id -> (videoPath, videoName)
    85→    private var currentTranscriptionId: String? = null
    86→
    87→    // 服务状态
    88→    private val _serviceState = MutableStateFlow<ServiceState>(ServiceState.Idle)
    89→    val serviceState: StateFlow<ServiceState> = _serviceState.asStateFlow()
    90→
    91→    private val binder = LocalBinder()
    92→
    93→    inner class LocalBinder : Binder() {
    94→        fun getService(): TranscriptionService = this@TranscriptionService
    95→    }
    96→
    97→    override fun onBind(intent: Intent?): IBinder = binder
    98→
    99→    override fun onCreate() {
   100→        super.onCreate()
   101→        Log.d(TAG, "Service created")
   102→        createNotificationChannel()
   103→    }
   104→
   105→    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {
   106→        when (intent?.action) {
   107→            ACTION_START -> {
   108→                val videoPath = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH)
   109→                val videoName = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME) ?: "视频"
   110→                if (videoPath != null) {
   111→                    startTranscription(videoPath, videoName)
   112→                }
   113→            }
   114→            ACTION_CANCEL -> {
   115→                cancelTranscription()
   116→            }
   117→        }
   118→        return START_STICKY
   119→    }
   120→
   121→    /**
   122→     * 开始转录
   123→     */
   124→    private fun startTranscription(videoPath: String, videoName: String) {
   125→        Log.d(TAG, "Starting transcription for: $videoPath")
   126→
   127→        val transcriptionId = System.currentTimeMillis().toString()
   128→
   129→        // 如果当前有转录任务在运行，加入队列
   130→        if (currentJob?.isActive == true) {
   131→            Log.w(TAG, "Transcription already running, adding to queue: $videoName")
   132→            transcriptionQueue[transcriptionId] = Pair(videoPath, videoName)
   133→            // 更新通知显示队列状态（通过 updateProgress）
   134→            updateProgress(videoName, 0, 0, 0, "队列中 (${transcriptionQueue.size} 等待)")
   135→            return
   136→        }
   137→
   138→        // 开始执行转录
   139→        executeTranscription(transcriptionId, videoPath, videoName)
   140→    }
   141→
   142→    /**
   143→     * 执行转录任务
   144→     */
   145→    private fun executeTranscription(
   146→        transcriptionId: String,
   147→        videoPath: String,
   148→        videoName: String
   149→    ) {
   150→        currentTranscriptionId = transcriptionId
   151→
   152→        // 启动前台服务
   153→        startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createProgressNotification(videoName, 0, 0, "正在准备..."))
   154→
   155→        currentJob = serviceScope.launch {
   156→            try {
   157→                _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(0, 0, 0, "正在准备...")
   158→
   159→                val config = aiConfigStore.config.first()
   160→                val videoFile = File(videoPath)
   161→
   162→                // 检查 API Key
   163→                val hasGroqKey = config.groqApiKey.isNotBlank() ||
   164→                                 (config.provider == "groq" && config.apiKey.isNotBlank())
   165→
   166→                if (!hasGroqKey) {
   167→                    sendErrorBroadcast("❌ 请先配置 Groq API Key\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
   168→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error("请先配置 Groq API Key")
   169→                    stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   170→                    stopSelf()
   171→                    return@launch
   172→                }
   173→
   174→                // 执行转录 - 使用用户指定的转录语言（如果设置了）
   175→                val transcribeLang = config.transcribeLanguage.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
   176→                val result = ffmpegSegmentedService.transcribeWithSegments(
   177→                    videoFile,
   178→                    config,
   179→                    transcribeLang,
   180→                    onProgress = { segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds ->
   181→                        updateProgress(videoName, segment, total, progress, message)
   182→                        sendProgressBroadcast(segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds)
   183→                        _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(
   184→                            segment, total, progress, message
   185→                        )
   186→                    }
   187→                )
   188→
   189→                // 转录完成
   190→                if (result != null && result.success) {
   191→                    val base = videoPath.substringBeforeLast(".")
   192→                    val vttPath = base + ".vtt"
   193→                    val wtsPath = base + ".wordts.json"
   194→
   195→                    // 如果字幕文件还不存在（可能是其他转录任务创建的），保存它们
   196→                    if (!File(vttPath).exists()) {
   197→                        saveSubtitles(result, vttPath, wtsPath)
   198→                    }
   199→
   200→                    sendCompletedBroadcast(true, result.detectedLang, result.text, videoPath, vttPath)
   201→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Completed(
   202→                        result.detectedLang,
   203→                        result.text
   204→                    )
   205→
   206→                    updateNotificationComplete(videoName)
   207→                    delay(3000) // 显示完成通知3秒
   208→
   209→                    // 处理队列中的下一个任务
   210→                    currentTranscriptionId = null
   211→                    processNextInQueue()
   212→
   213→                } else {
   214→                    val error = result?.error ?: "未知错误"
   215→                    sendErrorBroadcast(error)
   216→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error(error)
   217→
   218→                    // 失败后也处理队列中的下一个任务
   219→                    currentTranscriptionId = null
   220→                    processNextInQueue()
   221→                }
   222→
   223→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   224→                Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   225→                val error = "转录失败: ${e.message}"
   226→                sendErrorBroadcast(error)
   227→                _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error(error)
   228→
   229→                // 异常后也处理队列中的下一个任务
   230→                currentTranscriptionId = null
   231→                processNextInQueue()
   232→            }
   233→        }
   234→    }
   235→
   236→    /**
   237→     * 处理队列中的下一个转录任务
   238→     */
   239→    private fun processNextInQueue() {
   240→        if (transcriptionQueue.isEmpty()) {
   241→            // 队列为空，停止服务
   242→            stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   243→            stopSelf()
   244→            return
   245→        }
   246→
   247→        // 取出队列中的第一个任务
   248→        val (nextId, nextTask) = transcriptionQueue.entries.first()
   249→        transcriptionQueue.remove(nextId)
   250→
   251→        val (nextPath, nextName) = nextTask
   252→        Log.d(TAG, "Processing next in queue: $nextName (${transcriptionQueue.size} remaining)")
   253→
   254→        // 执行下一个转录任务
   255→        executeTranscription(nextId, nextPath, nextName)
   256→    }
   257→
   258→    /**
   259→     * 取消转录
   260→     */
   261→    private fun cancelTranscription() {
   262→        currentJob?.cancel()
   263→        currentJob = null
   264→        _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Idle
   265→        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   266→        stopSelf()
   267→        Log.d(TAG, "Transcription cancelled")
   268→    }
   269→
   270→    /**
   271→     * 保存字幕文件
   272→     */
   273→    private suspend fun saveSubtitles(
   274→        result: WhisperResult,
   275→        vttPath: String,
   276→        wtsPath: String
   277→    ) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   278→        val vttBuilder = StringBuilder("WEBVTT\n\n")
   279→        val allWordTimings = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   280→
   281→        if (result.words.isNotEmpty()) {
   282→            var curWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   283→            for (wt in result.words) {
   284→                curWords.add(wt)
   285→                if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$")) && curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   286→                    val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   287→                    val sStart = curWords.first().s
   288→                    val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   289→                    vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   290→                    allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   291→                    curWords = mutableListOf()
   292→                }
   293→            }
   294→            if (curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   295→                val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   296→                val sStart = curWords.first().s
   297→                val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   298→                vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   299→                allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   300→            }
   301→        }
   302→
   303→        File(vttPath).writeText(vttBuilder.toString())
   304→        if (allWordTimings.isNotEmpty()) {
   305→            val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
   306→            File(wtsPath).writeText(json.encodeToString(ListSerializer(WordTimestamp.serializer()), allWordTimings))
   307→        }
   308→
   309→        Log.d(TAG, "Subtitles saved: ${allWordTimings.size} words")
   310→    }
   311→
   312→    private fun updateProgress(videoName: String, segment: Int, total: Int, progress: Int, message: String) {
   313→        val notification = createProgressNotification(videoName, segment, total, message)
   314→        val notificationManager = getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
   315→        notificationManager.notify(NOTIFICATION_ID, notification)
   316→    }
   317→
   318→    private fun updateNotificationComplete(videoName: String) {
   319→        val notification = createCompleteNotification(videoName)
   320→        val notificationManager = getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
   321→        notificationManager.notify(NOTIFICATION_ID, notification)
   322→    }
   323→
   324→    private fun sendProgressBroadcast(segment: Int, total: Int, progress: Int, message: String, remaining: Long) {
   325→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_PROGRESS).apply {
   326→            putExtra(EXTRA_SEGMENT, segment)
   327→            putExtra(EXTRA_TOTAL, total)
   328→            putExtra(EXTRA_PROGRESS, progress)
   329→            putExtra(EXTRA_MESSAGE, message)
   330→            putExtra(EXTRA_REMAINING, remaining)
   331→        }
   332→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   333→
   334→        // 同时发送队列状态广播
   335→        sendQueueUpdateBroadcast()
   336→    }
   337→
   338→    /**
   339→     * 发送队列状态广播
   340→     */
   341→    private fun sendQueueUpdateBroadcast() {
   342→        val queueList = transcriptionQueue.values.map { it.second }.toTypedArray()
   343→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_QUEUE_UPDATE).apply {
   344→            putExtra(EXTRA_QUEUE_SIZE, transcriptionQueue.size)
   345→            putExtra(EXTRA_CURRENT_VIDEO, currentTranscriptionId)
   346→            putExtra(EXTRA_QUEUE_LIST, queueList)
   347→        }
   348→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   349→    }
   350→
   351→    private fun sendCompletedBroadcast(success: Boolean, detectedLang: String, text: String, videoPath: String? = null, vttPath: String? = null) {
   352→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_COMPLETED).apply {
   353→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUCCESS, success)
   354→            putExtra(EXTRA_DETECTED_LANG, detectedLang)
   355→            // 计算字幕数量（粗略估计：按句子分割）
   356→            val subtitleCount = text.split(Regex("[.!?。！？]")).filter { it.isNotBlank() }.size
   357→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUBTITLE_COUNT, subtitleCount)
   358→            videoPath?.let { putExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH, it) }
   359→            vttPath?.let { putExtra(EXTRA_VTT_PATH, it) }
   360→        }
   361→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   362→    }
   363→
   364→    private fun sendErrorBroadcast(error: String) {
   365→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_COMPLETED).apply {
   366→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUCCESS, false)
   367→            putExtra(EXTRA_ERROR, error)
   368→        }
   369→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   370→    }
   371→
   372→    /**
   373→     * 创建通知渠道
   374→     */
   375→    private fun createNotificationChannel() {
   376→        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
   377→            val channel = NotificationChannel(
   378→                CHANNEL_ID,
   379→                CHANNEL_NAME,
   380→                NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_LOW
   381→            ).apply {
   382→                description = "显示视频转录进度"
   383→                setShowBadge(false)
   384→            }
   385→            val notificationManager = getSystemService(NotificationManager::class.java)
   386→            notificationManager.createNotificationChannel(channel)
   387→        }
   388→    }
   389→
   390→    /**
   391→     * 创建进度通知
   392→     */
   393→    private fun createProgressNotification(
   394→        videoName: String,
   395→        segment: Int,
   396→        total: Int,
   397→        message: String
   398→    ): Notification {
   399→        val openIntent = Intent(this, com.multilanglearner.MainActivity::class.java).apply {
   400→            action = ACTION_OPEN
   401→            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
   402→        }
   403→        val openPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
   404→            this, 0, openIntent,
   405→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   406→        )
   407→
   408→        val cancelIntent = Intent(this, TranscriptionService::class.java).apply {
   409→            action = ACTION_CANCEL
   410→        }
   411→        val cancelPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getService(
   412→            this, 0, cancelIntent,
   413→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   414→        )
   415→
   416→        val progressText = if (total > 1) {
   417→            "分段 $segment/$total ($message)"
   418→        } else {
   419→            message
   420→        }
   421→
   422→        return NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)
   423→            .setContentTitle("正在转录: $videoName")
   424→            .setContentText(progressText)
   425→            .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_info)
   426→            .setOngoing(true)
   427→            .setAutoCancel(false)
   428→            .setContentIntent(openPendingIntent)
   429→            .addAction(android.R.drawable.ic_menu_close_clear_cancel, "取消", cancelPendingIntent)
   430→            .setProgress(total, segment, false)
   431→            .build()
   432→    }

    12→/**
    13→ * 分段转录服务 - 处理大视频文件的转录
    14→ * 对于超大文件，提供用户友好的处理建议
    15→ */
    16→@Singleton
    17→class SegmentedWhisperService @Inject constructor(
    18→    private val whisperService: WhisperService
    19→) {
    20→    companion object {
    21→        private const val TAG = "SegmentedWhisper"
    22→        // Groq API 文件大小限制
    23→        private const val MAX_FILE_SIZE = 100 * 1024 * 1024L // 100MB
    24→        // 建议分段处理的文件大小阈值
    25→        private const val SUGGEST_SEGMENT_SIZE = 150 * 1024 * 1024L // 150MB
    26→        // 最小文件大小
    27→        private const val MIN_FILE_SIZE = 1024L // 1KB
    28→    }
    29→
    30→    private val serviceScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + SupervisorJob())
    31→
    32→    /**
    33→     * 转录视频文件 - 支持大文件处理
    34→     * @param videoFile 视频文件
    35→     * @param config AI配置
    36→     * @param onProgress 进度回调
    37→     * @return 转录结果
    38→     */
    39→    suspend fun transcribeSegmented(
    40→        videoFile: File,
    41→        config: AIConfig,
    42→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _ -> }
    43→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    44→        try {
    45→            val fileSize = videoFile.length()
    46→            val fileSizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    47→
    48→            Log.d(TAG, "Starting transcription: file=${videoFile.name}, size=$fileSizeMB MB")
    49→            onProgress(1, 1, 10, "准备转录...")
    50→
    51→            // 检查最小文件大小
    52→            if (fileSize < MIN_FILE_SIZE) {
    53→                Log.e(TAG, "File too small: $fileSize bytes")
    54→                return@withContext WhisperResult(
    55→                    success = false,
    56→                    error = "❌ 视频文件过小\n\n文件大小: ${fileSize / 1024} KB\n最小要求: 1 KB\n\n请使用包含音频内容的有效视频文件"
    57→                )
    58→            }
    59→
    60→            // 获取视频时长
    61→            val duration = getVideoDuration(videoFile)
    62→            if (duration == null) {
    63→                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to get video duration")
    64→                return@withContext WhisperResult(
    65→                    success = false,
    66→                    error = "❌ 无法读取视频信息\n\n请确保视频文件完整且可播放\n\n支持的格式: MP4, WebM, MKV"
    67→                )
    68→            }
    69→
    70→            val durationMinutes = String.format("%.1f", duration / 60.0)
    71→            Log.d(TAG, "Video duration: ${durationMinutes} minutes (${duration} seconds)")
    72→
    73→            // 根据文件大小决定处理方式
    74→            when {
    75→                fileSize <= MAX_FILE_SIZE -> {
    76→                    // 文件在限制内，直接转录
    77→                    Log.d(TAG, "File within API limit, transcribing directly")
    78→                    onProgress(1, 1, 20, "文件大小合适，直接转录...")
    79→                    whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config)
    80→                }
    81→
    82→                fileSize <= SUGGEST_SEGMENT_SIZE -> {
    83→                    // 文件略超限制，尝试直接转录（Groq 可能支持更大文件）
    84→                    Log.d(TAG, "File slightly exceeds documented limit, attempting direct transcription")
    85→                    onProgress(1, 1, 20, "尝试直接转录...")
    86→
    87→                    val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config)
    88→
    89→                    if (result?.success == true) {
    90→                        result
    91→                    } else {
    92→                        // 如果直接转录失败，提供详细建议
    93→                        val errorMsg = result?.error ?: "未知错误"
    94→                        WhisperResult(
    95→                            success = false,
    96→                            error = "❌ 文件过大，转录失败\n\n$fileSizeMB MB 超过了 API 限制\n\n建议解决方案：\n\n" +
    97→                                "Option 1: Split with FFmpeg on PC\n" +
    98→                                "1. Download FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org\n" +
    99→                                "2. Extract segments:\n" +
   100→                                "   ffmpeg -i input.mp4 -t 300 part1.mp4\n" +
   101→                                "   ffmpeg -i input.mp4 -ss 295 -t 300 part2.mp4\n" +
   102→                                "3. Transcribe each part separately\n\n" +
   103→                                "Option 2: Compress video\n" +
   104→                                "ffmpeg -i input.mp4 -b:a 64k output.mp4\n\n" +
   105→                                "Error: $errorMsg"
   106→                        )
   107→                    }
   108→                }
   109→
   110→                else -> {
   111→                    // 文件太大，提供详细指导
   112→                    Log.d(TAG, "File too large for direct processing")
   113→                    WhisperResult(
   114→                        success = false,
   115→                        error = "❌ 文件过大，无法直接转录\n\n" +
   116→                            "文件信息：\n" +
   117→                            "Size: $fileSizeMB MB\n" +
   118→                            "Duration: ${durationMinutes} minutes\n\n" +
   119→                            "Solutions:\n\n" +
   120→                            "[Recommended] Option 1: Split with FFmpeg on PC\n" +
   121→                            "1. Install FFmpeg: https://ffmpeg.org\n" +
   122→                            "2. Extract 5-minute segments:\n" +
   123→                            "   ffmpeg -i video.mp4 -t 300 segment_01.mp4\n" +
   124→                            "   ffmpeg -i video.mp4 -ss 295 -t 305 segment_02.mp4\n" +
   125→                            "3. Import each segment to transcribe\n\n" +
   126→                            "Option 2: Compress video\n" +
   127→                            "ffmpeg -i video.mp4 -c:v libx264 -crf 28 -c:a aac -b:a 64k output.mp4\n\n" +
   128→                            "Option 3: Extract audio only\n" +
   129→                            "ffmpeg -i video.mp4 -vn -b:a 64k audio.mp4"
   130→                    )
   131→                }
   132→            }
   133→
   134→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   135→            Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   136→            WhisperResult(
   137→                success = false,
   138→                error = "❌ 转录失败\n\n${e.message}"
   139→            )
   140→        }
   141→    }

   143→    /**
   144→     * 获取视频时长（秒）- 使用 Android 原生 API
   145→     */
   146→    private fun getVideoDuration(videoFile: File): Double? {
   147→        val retriever = MediaMetadataRetriever()
   148→        return try {
   149→            retriever.setDataSource(videoFile.absolutePath)
   150→            val durationStr = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_DURATION)
   151→            durationStr?.toDoubleOrNull()?.let { it / 1000.0 }
   152→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   153→            Log.e(TAG, "Error getting video duration", e)
   154→            null
   155→        } finally {
   156→            try {
   157→                retriever.release()
   158→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   159→                Log.e(TAG, "Error releasing retriever", e)
   160→            }
   161→        }
   162→    }
   163→
   164→    /**
   165→     * 获取视频文件的详细信息
   166→     */
   167→    fun getVideoInfo(videoFile: File): VideoInfo? {
   168→        val retriever = MediaMetadataRetriever()
   169→        return try {
   170→            retriever.setDataSource(videoFile.absolutePath)
   171→
   172→            val duration = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_DURATION)
   173→                ?.toDoubleOrNull()?.div(1000.0)
   174→            val width = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_VIDEO_WIDTH)
   175→                ?.toIntOrNull()
   176→            val height = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_VIDEO_HEIGHT)
   177→                ?.toIntOrNull()
   178→            val bitrate = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_BITRATE)
   179→                ?.toIntOrNull()
   180→            val rotation = retriever.extractMetadata(MediaMetadataRetriever.METADATA_KEY_VIDEO_ROTATION)
   181→                ?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
   182→
   183→            VideoInfo(
   184→                duration = duration,
   185→                width = width,
   186→                height = height,
   187→                bitrate = bitrate,
   188→                rotation = rotation,
   189→                fileSize = videoFile.length()
   190→            )
   191→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   192→            Log.e(TAG, "Error getting video info", e)
   193→            null
   194→        } finally {
   195→            try {
   196→                retriever.release()
   197→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   198→                Log.e(TAG, "Error releasing retriever", e)
   199→            }
   200→        }
   201→    }
   202→}

   211→    val bitrate: Int?,          // 比特率
   212→    val rotation: Int,          // 旋转角度

   214→)

    98→    enum class SegmentStatus {

   107→    /**
   108→     * 分段转录视频
   109→     * @param videoFile 视频文件
   110→     * @param config AI配置
   111→     * @param lang 视频语言代码（如 "en", "ru", "ja" 等），null 表示自动检测
   112→     * @param onProgress 进度回调 (当前段, 总段数, 百分比, 消息, 剩余秒数)
   113→     */
   114→    suspend fun transcribeWithSegments(
   115→        videoFile: File,
   116→        config: AIConfig,
   117→        lang: String? = null,
   118→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _, _ -> }
   119→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   120→        try {
   121→            val fileSize = videoFile.length()
   122→            val fileSizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
   123→
   124→            Log.d(TAG, "Starting segmented transcription: ${videoFile.name}, $fileSizeMB MB")
   125→            onProgress(0, 1, 5, "获取视频信息...", 0)
   126→
   127→            // 获取视频时长和详细信息
   128→            val mediaInfo = getMediaInformation(videoFile)
   129→
   130→            // 尝试解析时长，兼容多种格式
   131→            val duration = try {
   132→                val durationStr = mediaInfo?.getDuration()
   133→                when {
   134→                    durationStr == null -> null
   135→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+")) -> durationStr.toLongOrNull()?.div(1000.0)
   136→                    durationStr.matches(Regex("\\d+\\.\\d+")) -> durationStr.toDoubleOrNull()
   137→                    else -> {
   138→                        Log.e(TAG, "Invalid duration format: $durationStr")
   139→                        null
   140→                    }
   141→                }
   142→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   143→                Log.e(TAG, "Error parsing duration: $mediaInfo", e)
   144→                null
   145→            }
   146→
   147→            if (duration == null) {
   148→                Log.e(TAG, "Failed to get video duration")
   149→                return@withContext WhisperResult(
   150→                    success = false,
   151→                    error = "无法读取视频时长，请确保视频文件有效。\n\nFFmpeg 错误: ${mediaInfo?.getAllProperties()}"
   152→                )
   153→            }
   154→
   155→            val durationMinutes = String.format("%.1f", duration / 60.0)
   156→            Log.d(TAG, "Video duration: $durationMinutes minutes ($duration seconds), file size: $fileSizeMB MB")
   157→
   158→            // 判断处理策略 - 基于时长而不是文件大小
   159→            return@withContext when {
   160→                duration <= SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD && fileSize <= MAX_API_FILE_SIZE -> {
   161→                    // 时长较短且文件在API限制内，先压缩音频再转录
   162→                    Log.d(TAG, "Direct transcription with compression (duration: ${duration.toInt()}s, size: ${fileSizeMB}MB)")
   163→                    onProgress(1, 1, 10, "压缩音频...", 0)
   164→
   165→                    // 先压缩音频
   166→                    val compressedFile = compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile)
   167→                    if (compressedFile == null) {
   168→                        Log.e(TAG, "Failed to compress audio, trying original file")
   169→                        onProgress(1, 1, 20, "直接转录中...", 0)
   170→                        whisperService.transcribeGroq(videoFile, config, lang)
   171→                    } else {
   172→                        Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${compressedFile.length()} bytes")
   173→                        onProgress(1, 1, 30, "转录中...", 0)
   174→                        val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(compressedFile, config, lang)
   175→                        // 删除临时压缩文件
   176→                        compressedFile.delete()
   177→                        result
   178→                    }
   179→                }
   180→                else -> {
   181→                    // 时长较长或文件过大，需要分段处理
   182→                    val reason = if (duration > SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD) {
   183→                        "video duration exceeds ${SEGMENTED_TRANSCRIPTION_THRESHOLD.toInt()/60} minutes"
   184→                    } else {
   185→                        "file size exceeds ${MAX_API_FILE_SIZE/1024/1024}MB"
   186→                    }
   187→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription: $reason")
   188→                    transcribeSegmentedInternal(videoFile, config, duration, lang, onProgress)
   189→                }
   190→            }
   191→
   192→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   193→            Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   194→            Log.e(TAG, "Error stack trace: ${e.stackTraceToString()}")
   195→            WhisperResult(
   196→                success = false,
   197→                error = "❌ 转录失败\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n详细日志已输出到 logcat"
   198→            )
   199→        }
   200→    }
   201→
   202→    /**
   203→     * 内部分段转录实现 - 增强版（详细进度跟踪）
   204→     */
   205→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentedInternal(
   206→        videoFile: File,
   207→        config: AIConfig,
   208→        duration: Double,
   209→        lang: String?,
   210→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   211→    ): WhisperResult? {
   212→        // 计算分段数量，传入文件大小以优化分段策略
   213→        val segments = calculateSegments(duration, videoFile.length())
   214→        val totalSegments = segments.size
   215→
   216→        Log.d(TAG, "Will process in $totalSegments segments (parallel: $PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)")
   217→        onProgress(0, totalSegments, 10, "准备处理 $totalSegments 个分段...", 0)
   218→
   219→        // 分段状态跟踪
   220→        val segmentStates = mutableMapOf<Int, SegmentState>()
   221→        segments.forEachIndexed { index, _ ->
   222→            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.PENDING)
   223→        }
   224→
   225→        // 创建临时目录
   226→        val tempDir = File(context.cacheDir, "$TEMP_DIR${System.currentTimeMillis()}")
   227→        tempDir.mkdirs()
   228→
   229→        // 时间跟踪
   230→        val startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   231→        val segmentTimes = mutableMapOf<Int, Long>()
   232→
   233→        return try {
   234→            val allWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   235→            var failedSegments = 0
   236→            val successSegments = mutableListOf<Int>()
   237→
   238→            // 第一步：提取所有音频段（串行，因为IO密集）
   239→            onProgress(0, totalSegments, 15, "提取音频段...", 0)
   240→            val segmentFiles = mutableListOf<File?>()
   241→            segments.forEachIndexed { index, segment ->
   242→                val segmentFile = File(tempDir, "segment_${index}.m4a")
   243→
   244→                // 更新状态
   245→                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTING, "提取音频中...")
   246→                updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 15 + (index * 20 / totalSegments),
   247→                    "提取音频 ${index + 1}/$totalSegments...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   248→
   249→                val extractSuccess = withTimeout(EXTRACTION_TIMEOUT_SEC * 1000L) {
   250→                    extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(videoFile, segmentFile, segment.startTime, segment.duration, index)
   251→                }
   252→
   253→                if (extractSuccess && segmentFile.exists()) {
   254→                    segmentFiles.add(segmentFile)
   255→                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.EXTRACTED, "音频已提取")
   256→                    Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index extracted successfully")
   257→                } else {
   258→                    Log.e(TAG, "Failed to extract segment $index")
   259→                    segmentFiles.add(null)
   260→                    segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, "音频提取失败")
   261→                    failedSegments++
   262→                }
   263→
   264→                // 更新状态
   265→                updateProgressWithStates(index + 1, totalSegments, 15 + ((index + 1) * 20 / totalSegments),
   266→                    "提取完成 ${index + 1}/$totalSegments", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   267→            }
   268→
   269→            // 第二步：并行转录音频段
   270→            updateProgressWithStates(0, totalSegments, 40, "开始转录...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   271→
   272→            val completedIndices = mutableListOf<Int>()
   273→            val transcriptionMutex = Mutex()
   274→            // 使用 semaphore 控制并发数
   275→            val semaphore = Semaphore(PARALLEL_SEGMENTS)
   276→
   277→            // 使用 coroutineScope 来并行处理
   278→            val results = coroutineScope {
   279→                // 创建分段任务
   280→                val transcriptionJobs = segments.mapIndexed { index, segment ->
   281→                    async(Dispatchers.IO) {
   282→                        // 使用 semaphore 限制并发数
   283→                        semaphore.withPermit {
   284→                            if (segmentFiles[index] == null) {
   285→                                Log.e(TAG, "Skipping segment $index (file not extracted)")
   286→                                return@async null
   287→                            }
   288→
   289→                            val segmentFile = segmentFiles[index]!!
   290→                            val segmentStartTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
   291→
   292→                            // 更新状态为转录中
   293→                            segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING, "转录中...")
   294→                            updateProgressWithStates(completedIndices.size, totalSegments, 40,
   295→                                "段 ${index + 1} 转录中...", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   296→
   297→                            // 计算本段转录超时时间
   298→                            val transcriptionTimeout = (segment.duration / 60.0 * TRANSCRIPTION_TIMEOUT_SEC_PER_MIN * 1000).toLong()
   299→
   300→                            // 转录该段
   301→                            val result = withTimeout(transcriptionTimeout) {
   302→                                transcribeSegmentWithRetry(segmentFile, config, index, segment.duration, lang)
   303→                            }
   304→
   305→                            val transcriptionTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - segmentStartTime
   306→                            segmentTimes[index] = transcriptionTime
   307→
   308→                            if (result?.success == true) {
   309→                                // 调整时间戳
   310→                                val adjustedWords = result.words.map { wt ->
   311→                                    wt.copy(s = wt.s + segment.startTime, e = wt.e + segment.startTime)
   312→                                }
   313→
   314→                                // 线程安全地添加结果
   315→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   316→                                    // 去除重叠部分
   317→                                    if (index > 0) {
   318→                                        val overlapThreshold = segment.startTime - OVERLAP_DURATION.toDouble()
   319→                                        val filteredWords = adjustedWords.filter { it.s >= overlapThreshold }
   320→                                        allWords.addAll(filteredWords)
   321→                                    } else {
   322→                                        allWords.addAll(adjustedWords)
   323→                                    }
   324→                                    completedIndices.add(index)
   325→                                    successSegments.add(index)
   326→                                }
   327→
   328→                                // 删除临时段文件
   329→                                segmentFile.delete()
   330→
   331→                                // 更新状态为完成
   332→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.COMPLETED, "已完成 (${result.words.size} 词)")
   333→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   334→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   335→                                    val progress = 40 + (completedCount * 50 / totalSegments)
   336→                                    val remainingTime = estimateRemainingTime(completedCount - 1, totalSegments, segmentTimes, startTime)
   337→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, progress,
   338→                                        "转录中 $completedCount/$totalSegments...", remainingTime, segmentStates, onProgress)
   339→                                }
   340→
   341→                                Log.d(TAG, "Segment $index transcribed: ${result.words.size} words, time=${transcriptionTime}ms")
   342→                                result
   343→                            } else {
   344→                                Log.e(TAG, "Segment $index transcription failed: ${result?.error}")
   345→                                failedSegments++
   346→
   347→                                // 更新状态为失败
   348→                                val errorBrief = if (result?.error?.contains("API Key") == true) "API Key错误"
   349→                                    else if (result?.error?.contains("quota") == true) "配额用尽"
   350→                                    else if (result?.error?.contains("network") == true) "网络错误"
   351→                                    else "转录失败"
   352→
   353→                                segmentStates[index] = SegmentState(index, SegmentStatus.FAILED, errorBrief)
   354→
   355→                                transcriptionMutex.withLock {
   356→                                    val completedCount = completedIndices.size
   357→                                    updateProgressWithStates(completedCount, totalSegments, 40 + ((completedCount + 1) * 50 / totalSegments),
   358→                                        "段 ${index + 1} 失败: $errorBrief", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   359→                                }
   360→
   361→                                null
   362→                            }
   363→                        }
   364→                    }
   365→                }
   366→
   367→                // 等待所有转录任务完成
   368→                transcriptionJobs.awaitAll()
   369→            }
   370→
   371→            // 按时间排序所有单词
   372→            allWords.sortBy { it.s }
   373→
   374→            // 清理临时目录
   375→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   376→
   377→            if (allWords.isEmpty()) {
   378→                // 所有分段都失败了 - 提供详细的失败原因
   379→                val failedDetails = segmentStates.entries
   380→                    .filter { it.value.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   381→                    .map { "段 ${it.key + 1}: ${it.value.message}" }
   382→                    .joinToString("\n")
   383→
   384→                WhisperResult(
   385→                    success = false,
   386→                    error = "❌ 所有分段转录失败\n\n" +
   387→                        "总段数: $totalSegments\n" +
   388→                        "失败: $failedSegments\n" +
   389→                        "成功: 0\n\n" +
   390→                        "失败详情:\n$failedDetails\n\n" +
   391→                        "建议解决方案:\n" +
   392→                        "1. 检查网络连接是否正常\n" +
   393→                        "2. 确认 Groq API Key 已正确配置\n" +
   394→                        "3. 查看是否有配额限制\n" +
   395→                        "4. 尝试减少并发转录数量"
   396→                )
   397→            } else {
   398→                // 部分或全部成功
   399→                val sentences = buildSentences(allWords)
   400→                val fullText = sentences.joinToString(" ")
   401→                val totalTime = System.currentTimeMillis() - startTime
   402→
   403→                updateProgressWithStates(totalSegments, totalSegments, 100, "转录完成！", 0, segmentStates, onProgress)
   404→
   405→                val resultMessage = if (failedSegments > 0) {
   406→                    "转录完成（部分失败）\n\n成功: ${successSegments.size}/$totalSegments\n失败: $failedSegments"
   407→                } else {
   408→                    "转录完成！\n\n成功: $totalSegments/$totalSegments 段"
   409→                }
   410→
   411→                Log.d(TAG, "Segmented transcription complete: ${allWords.size} words, ${sentences.size} sentences")
   412→                Log.d(TAG, "Total time: ${formatTime(totalTime)}, Failed: $failedSegments/$totalSegments")
   413→
   414→                WhisperResult(
   415→                    success = true,
   416→                    text = fullText,
   417→                    words = allWords,
   418→                    detectedLang = ""
   419→                )
   420→            }
   421→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   422→            tempDir.deleteRecursively()
   423→            Log.e(TAG, "Segmented transcription error", e)
   424→            WhisperResult(
   425→                success = false,
   426→                error = "分段转录失败: ${e.message}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
   427→            )
   428→        }
   429→    }

   431→    /**
   432→     * 更新进度（带分段状态）
   433→     */
   434→    private fun updateProgressWithStates(
   435→        currentSegment: Int,
   436→        totalSegments: Int,
   437→        percent: Int,
   438→        message: String,
   439→        remainingSeconds: Long,
   440→        segmentStates: Map<Int, SegmentState>,
   441→        onProgress: (Int, Int, Int, String, Long) -> Unit
   442→    ) {
   443→        // 在消息中添加状态摘要
   444→        val completedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.COMPLETED }
   445→        val failedCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.FAILED }
   446→        val inProgressCount = segmentStates.values.count { it.status == SegmentStatus.TRANSCRIBING }
   447→
   448→        val statusSummary = when {
   449→            failedCount > 0 -> " (成功$completedCount, 失败$failedCount)"
   450→            inProgressCount > 0 -> " (进行中$inProgressCount)"
   451→            else -> ""
   452→        }
   453→
   454→        onProgress(currentSegment, totalSegments, percent, message + statusSummary, remainingSeconds)
   455→    }

   457→    /**
   458→     * 提取音频段 - 带重试机制
   459→     */
   460→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegmentWithRetry(
   461→        inputFile: File,
   462→        outputFile: File,
   463→        startTime: Double,
   464→        duration: Double,
   465→        segmentIndex: Int
   466→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   467→        var lastError: Exception? = null
   468→
   469→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   470→            if (attempt > 0) {
   471→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex extraction, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   472→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt)
   473→            }
   474→
   475→            try {
   476→                val success = extractAudioSegment(inputFile, outputFile, startTime, duration)
   477→                if (success) return@withContext true
   478→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   479→                Log.w(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction attempt $attempt failed: ${e.message}")
   480→                lastError = e
   481→            }
   482→        }
   483→
   484→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex extraction failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries", lastError)
   485→        false
   486→    }

   488→    /**
   489→     * 转录单个段 - 带重试机制
   490→     */
   491→    private suspend fun transcribeSegmentWithRetry(
   492→        segmentFile: File,
   493→        config: AIConfig,
   494→        segmentIndex: Int,
   495→        segmentDuration: Double,
   496→        lang: String?
   497→    ): WhisperResult? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   498→        var lastResult: WhisperResult? = null
   499→
   500→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
   501→            if (attempt > 0) {
   502→                Log.d(TAG, "Retrying segment $segmentIndex transcription, attempt $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
   503→                delay(RETRY_DELAY_MS * attempt)
   504→            }
   505→
   506→            val result = whisperService.transcribeGroq(segmentFile, config, lang)
   507→            if (result?.success == true) {
   508→                // 成功后添加延迟，避免请求过快被限流
   509→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   510→                return@withContext result
   511→            }
   512→            // 重试前添加延迟，避免请求过快被限流
   513→            if (attempt < MAX_RETRIES - 1) {
   514→                delay(API_REQUEST_INTERVAL_MS)
   515→            }
   516→            lastResult = result
   517→        }
   518→
   519→        Log.e(TAG, "Segment $segmentIndex transcription failed after $MAX_RETRIES retries")
   520→        lastResult
   521→    }

   523→    /**
   524→     * 估算剩余时间（秒）
   525→     */
   526→    private fun estimateRemainingTime(
   527→        currentIndex: Int,
   528→        totalSegments: Int,
   529→        segmentTimes: Map<Int, Long>,
   530→        overallStartTime: Long
   531→    ): Long {
   532→        if (currentIndex == 0 || segmentTimes.isEmpty()) {
   533→            // 还没有完成任何段，预估每段需要2分钟
   534→            return (totalSegments * 120L)
   535→        }
   536→
   537→        // 计算已完成段的平均时间
   538→        val avgTimePerSegment = segmentTimes.values.average()
   539→        val remainingSegments = totalSegments - currentIndex
   540→
   541→        return (avgTimePerSegment * remainingSegments / 1000).toLong()
   542→    }

   544→    /**
   545→     * 格式化时间显示
   546→     */
   547→    private fun formatTime(milliseconds: Long): String {
   548→        val seconds = milliseconds / 1000
   549→        return when {
   550→            seconds < 60 -> "${seconds}秒"
   551→            seconds < 3600 -> "${seconds / 60}分${seconds % 60}秒"
   552→            else -> "${seconds / 3600}小时${(seconds % 3600) / 60}分"
   553→        }
   554→    }

   556→    /**
   557→     * 计算分段策略 - 智能分段，根据文件大小动态调整
   558→     * 大文件使用更短的分段时长，确保每段文件大小在API限制内
   559→     */
   560→    private fun calculateSegments(duration: Double, fileSize: Long = 0): List<AudioSegment> {
   561→        val segments = mutableListOf<AudioSegment>()
   562→
   563→        // 根据文件大小和时长计算最佳分段时长
   564→        // 预估比特率 = 文件大小 / 时长
   565→        val estimatedBitrate = if (fileSize > 0 && duration > 0) {
   566→            (fileSize * 8.0 / duration / 1000.0) // kbps
   567→        } else {
   568→            128.0 // 默认假设128kbps
   569→        }
   570→
   571→        // 计算确保不超过 TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE 的最大分段时长
   572→        val maxSegmentDurationForSize = if (estimatedBitrate > 0) {
   573→            (TARGET_SEGMENT_SIZE * 8.0 / estimatedBitrate / 1000.0).coerceAtMost(SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble())
   574→        } else {
   575→            SEGMENT_DURATION.toDouble()
   576→        }
   577→
   578→        // 使用计算出的分段时长，但不低于3分钟
   579→        val segmentDurationSec = maxSegmentDurationForSize.coerceAtLeast(180.0)
   580→        val overlapDurationSec = OVERLAP_DURATION.toDouble()
   581→        val effectiveAdvance = segmentDurationSec - overlapDurationSec
   582→
   583→        Log.d(TAG, "Segment strategy: duration=${segmentDurationSec.toInt()}s, overlap=${overlapDurationSec}s, bitrate=${estimatedBitrate.toInt()}kbps")
   584→
   585→        // 预先计算分段数量，避免无限循环
   586→        val totalSegments = ((duration - overlapDurationSec) / effectiveAdvance).toInt().coerceAtLeast(1)
   587→
   588→        for (index in 0 until totalSegments) {
   589→            val startTime = index * effectiveAdvance
   590→            val segmentDuration = if (index == totalSegments - 1) {
   591→                // 最后一段：处理剩余所有时间
   592→                duration - startTime
   593→            } else {
   594→                // 中间段：固定长度
   595→                segmentDurationSec
   596→            }
   597→            segments.add(AudioSegment(index, startTime, segmentDuration))
   598→        }
   599→
   600→        return segments
   601→    }

   603→    /**
   604→     * 提取音频段 - 使用 stream copy 避免重新编码
   605→     */
   606→    private suspend fun extractAudioSegment(
   607→        inputFile: File,
   608→        outputFile: File,
   609→        startTime: Double,
   610→        duration: Double
   611→    ): Boolean = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   612→        try {
   613→            // 确保输出目录存在
   614→            outputFile.parentFile?.mkdirs()
   615→
   616→            // 构建命令字符串 - 使用 -c copy 直接复制音频流，不重新编码
   617→            val commandStr = buildString {
   618→                append("-hide_banner -y ")
   619→                append("-ss $startTime ")
   620→                append("-i \"${inputFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   621→                append("-t $duration ")
   622→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   623→                append("-c:a copy ")  // 直接复制音频流，不重新编码
   624→                append("\"${outputFile.absolutePath}\"")
   625→            }
   626→
   627→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   628→            Log.d(TAG, "Input file: ${inputFile.absolutePath}, size: ${inputFile.length()}")
   629→            Log.d(TAG, "Output file: ${outputFile.absolutePath}")
   630→
   631→            // 使用同步执行
   632→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   633→
   634→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   635→            val output = session.output
   636→
   637→            Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   638→            if (output?.isNotEmpty() == true) {
   639→                Log.d(TAG, "FFmpeg output: ${output.substring(0, minOf(200, output.length))}")
   640→            }
   641→
   642→            // 检查输出文件
   643→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0) && outputFile.exists() && outputFile.length() > 1024
   644→
   645→            Log.d(TAG, "Segment extraction result: $success, file size: ${outputFile.length()}, return code: ${returnCode?.value}")
   646→            success
   647→
   648→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   649→            Log.e(TAG, "Error extracting segment", e)
   650→            false
   651→        }
   652→    }

   658→    private suspend fun compressAudioForTranscription(videoFile: File): File? = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   659→        try {

   662→            val commandStr = buildString {

   664→                append("-i \"${videoFile.absolutePath}\" ")
   665→                append("-vn ")  // 不要视频
   666→                append("-acodec aac ")  // 使用 AAC 编码
   667→                append("-b:a 24k ")  // 24kbps 比特率
   668→                append("-ac 1 ")  // 单声道
   669→                append("-ar 16000 ")  // 16kHz 采样率（Whisper 推荐的最小值）
   670→                append("\"${tempFile.absolutePath}\"")
   671→            }
   672→
   673→            Log.d(TAG, "Compression command: ffmpeg $commandStr")
   674→            val session = FFmpegKit.execute(commandStr)
   675→
   676→            val returnCode = session.returnCode
   677→            val success = (returnCode?.value == 0 || returnCode?.value == 1) && tempFile.exists()
   678→
   679→            if (success) {
   680→                Log.d(TAG, "Audio compressed: ${tempFile.length()} bytes")
   681→                tempFile
   682→            } else {
   683→                Log.e(TAG, "Compression failed: return code ${returnCode?.value}")
   684→                tempFile.delete()
   685→                null
   686→            }
   687→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   688→            Log.e(TAG, "Error compressing audio", e)
   689→            null
   690→        }
   691→    }

   720→    /**
   721→     * 从单词构建句子
   722→     */
   723→    private fun buildSentences(words: List<WordTimestamp>): List<String> {
   724→        val sentences = mutableListOf<String>()
   725→        val currentSentence = mutableListOf<String>()
   726→
   727→        words.forEach { wt ->
   728→            currentSentence.add(wt.w)
   729→
   730→            // 检查句子结束
   731→            if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$"))) {
   732→                sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   733→                currentSentence.clear()
   734→            }
   735→        }
   736→
   737→        // 添加最后一个未完成的句子
   738→        if (currentSentence.isNotEmpty()) {
   739→            sentences.add(currentSentence.joinToString(" "))
   740→        }
   741→
   742→        return sentences
   743→    }
   744→}
   745→
   746→/**
   747→ * 音频分段数据类
   748→ */
   749→data class AudioSegment(
   750→    val index: Int,
   751→    val startTime: Double,  // 段开始时间（秒）
   752→    val duration: Double     // 段持续时间（秒）
   753→)

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.util.Log
     4→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
     5→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
     6→import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
     7→import kotlinx.serialization.json.*
     8→import okhttp3.*
     9→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
    10→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.asRequestBody
    11→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    12→import java.io.File
    13→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    14→import javax.inject.Inject
    15→import javax.inject.Singleton
    16→
    17→@Serializable
    18→data class WhisperResult(
    19→    val success: Boolean,
    20→    val text: String = "",
    21→    val words: List<WordTimestamp> = emptyList(),
    22→    val detectedLang: String = "",
    23→    val error: String = ""
    24→)
    25→
    26→@Singleton
    27→class WhisperService @Inject constructor() {
    28→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    29→        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)  // 减少连接超时，加快重试
    30→        .readTimeout(600, TimeUnit.SECONDS)    // 增加读取超时，支持长音频
    31→        .writeTimeout(120, TimeUnit.SECONDS)   // 增加写入超时
    32→        .retryOnConnectionFailure(true)        // 启用自动重试
    33→        .build()
    34→
    35→    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
    36→
    37→    // Groq API 文件大小限制（增加到 100MB，Groq 实际支持更大）
    38→    private val MAX_FILE_SIZE = 100 * 1024 * 1024L
    39→    private val MIN_FILE_SIZE = 1024L // 最小 1KB，避免空文件或太小的文件
    40→
    41→    // 最大重试次数
    42→    private val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    43→
    44→    /**
    45→     * Transcribe audio via Groq Whisper API
    46→     * 优先使用 groqApiKey，其次使用 provider 为 groq 时的 apiKey
    47→     * 添加自动重试机制
    48→     */
    49→    suspend fun transcribeGroq(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    50→        // 自动重试逻辑
    51→        var lastError: Exception? = null
    52→        repeat(MAX_RETRIES) { attempt ->
    53→            if (attempt > 0) {
    54→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Retry $attempt/$MAX_RETRIES")
    55→                kotlinx.coroutines.delay(2000L * attempt) // 递增延迟
    56→            }
    57→
    58→            val result = transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile, config, lang)
    59→            if (result?.success == true) {
    60→                return result
    61→            }
    62→            lastError = Exception(result?.error ?: "Unknown error")
    63→        }
    64→
    65→        // 所有重试都失败
    66→        return WhisperResult(
    67→            success = false,
    68→            error = "❌ 转录失败（已重试 $MAX_RETRIES 次）\n\n${lastError?.message ?: "未知错误"}\n\n建议：检查网络连接和 API Key 配置"
    69→        )
    70→    }
    71→
    72→    /**
    73→     * 内部转录实现
    74→     */
    75→    private suspend fun transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    76→        // 获取 Groq API Key：优先使用专门的 groqApiKey，其次检查 provider 是否为 groq
    77→        val apiKey = config.groqApiKey.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
    78→            ?: (config.apiKey.takeIf { config.provider == "groq" && it.isNotBlank() })
    79→            ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "❌ 未配置 Groq API Key\n\n请前往「AI 设置」配置 Groq API Key。\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
    80→
    81→        val whisperModel = config.whisperModel.ifBlank { "whisper-large-v3-turbo" }
    82→
    83→        // 检查文件大小
    84→        val fileSize = audioFile.length()
    85→        Log.d("WhisperService", "File size: $fileSize bytes, max: $MAX_FILE_SIZE")
    86→
    87→        // 检查最小文件大小
    88→        if (fileSize < MIN_FILE_SIZE) {
    89→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too small: $fileSize bytes (min: $MIN_FILE_SIZE)")
    90→            return WhisperResult(
    91→                success = false,
    92→                error = "❌ 视频文件过小\n\n文件大小: ${fileSize / 1024} KB\n最小要求: 1 KB\n\n建议：请使用包含音频内容的有效视频文件"
    93→            )
    94→        }
    95→
    96→        if (fileSize > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
    97→            val sizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    98→            val maxMB = String.format("%.2f", MAX_FILE_SIZE / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    99→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too large: $sizeMB MB (max: $maxMB MB)")
   100→            return WhisperResult(
   101→                success = false,
   102→                error = "❌ 视频文件过大\n\n文件大小: $sizeMB MB\nGroq 限制: $maxMB MB\n\n建议解决方案：\n1. 使用较短的视频片段\n2. 在电脑上用 ffmpeg 压缩视频\n3. 在电脑上使用 yt-dlp 只下载音频"
   103→            )
   104→        }
   105→
   106→        Log.d("WhisperService", "Starting transcription with Groq Whisper: model=$whisperModel, file=${audioFile.name}, size=$fileSize")
   107→
   108→        val bodyBuilder = MultipartBody.Builder().setType(MultipartBody.FORM)
   109→            .addFormDataPart("file", audioFile.name, audioFile.asRequestBody("application/octet-stream".toMediaType()))
   110→            .addFormDataPart("model", whisperModel)
   111→            .addFormDataPart("response_format", "verbose_json")
   112→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "word")
   113→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "segment")
   114→            .addFormDataPart("temperature", "0")
   115→            .addFormDataPart("prompt", "Transcribe accurately with proper punctuation and capitalization.")
   116→
   117→        lang?.let { bodyBuilder.addFormDataPart("language", it) }
   118→
   119→        val request = Request.Builder()
   120→            .url("https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions")
   121→            .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $apiKey")
   122→            .post(bodyBuilder.build())
   123→            .build()
   124→
   125→        return try {
   126→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Sending request to Groq API...")
   127→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   128→
   129→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response code: ${response.code}")
   130→
   131→            if (response.code != 200) {
   132→                val errorBody = response.body?.string() ?: "Unknown error"
   133→                Log.e("WhisperService", "API error: $errorBody")
   134→
   135→                // 解析错误信息
   136→                val errorMsg = try {
   137→                    val errorJson = json.parseToJsonElement(errorBody).jsonObject
   138→                    val errObj = errorJson["error"]?.jsonObject
   139→                    val errMsg = errObj?.get("message")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   140→                    val errType = errObj?.get("type")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   141→                    val errCode = errObj?.get("code")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   142→
   143→                    when {
   144→                        errMsg?.contains("invalid_api_key", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   145→                        errMsg?.contains("Unauthorized", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   146→                        response.code == 401 ->
   147→                            "❌ API Key 无效\n\n请检查 Groq API Key 是否正确配置\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys"
   148→                        errMsg?.contains("quota", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   149→                        errMsg?.contains("limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   150→                        errMsg?.contains("rate_limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   151→                        response.code == 429 ->
   152→                            "❌ API 配额已用完\n\nGroq API 使用次数已达限制\n\n建议：\n1. 等待配额重置\n2. 更换 API Key\n3. 升级 Groq 账户"
   153→                        errMsg?.contains("forbidden", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   154→                        errMsg?.contains("banned", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   155→                        response.code == 403 ->
   156→                            "❌ 转录被禁止\n\n${errMsg ?: "访问被限制"}\n\n可能原因：\n1. API Key 被禁用\n2. 账户存在违规行为\n3. 内容不符合使用条款"
   157→                        else -> "❌ 转录失败 ($response.code)\n\n${errMsg ?: errorBody}"
   158→                    }
   159→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   160→                    "❌ 转录失败\n\n${errorBody.take(200)}"
   161→                }
   162→
   163→                return WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   164→            }
   165→
   166→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "空响应")
   167→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response length: ${body.length}")
   168→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response body preview: ${body.take(500)}")
   169→
   170→            // 检查响应是否为有效的 JSON
   171→            if (!body.trim().startsWith("{") && !body.trim().startsWith("[")) {
   172→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response is not valid JSON: ${body.take(200)}")
   173→                return WhisperResult(
   174→                    success = false,
   175→                    error = "❌ API 返回格式错误\n\nGroq API 返回了非 JSON 格式的响应。\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   176→                )
   177→            }
   178→
   179→            try {
   180→                val jsonObj = json.parseToJsonElement(body).jsonObject
   181→                val text = jsonObj["text"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   182→                val detectedLang = jsonObj["language"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   183→
   184→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Transcribed text length: ${text.length}, detected language: $detectedLang")
   185→
   186→                val words = jsonObj["words"]?.jsonArray?.map { w ->
   187→                    val obj = w.jsonObject
   188→                    WordTimestamp(
   189→                        w = obj["word"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: "",
   190→                        s = (obj["start"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0),
   191→                        e = (obj["end"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0)
   192→                    )
   193→                } ?: emptyList()
   194→
   195→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Word timestamps count: ${words.size}")
   196→
   197→                WhisperResult(
   198→                    success = true,
   199→                    text = text,
   200→                    words = words,
   201→                    detectedLang = detectedLang
   202→                )
   203→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   204→                Log.e("WhisperService", "JSON parsing error", e)
   205→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response body: $body")
   206→                WhisperResult(
   207→                    success = false,
   208→                    error = "❌ 响应解析失败\n\nGroq API 返回了无法解析的响应。\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   209→                )
   210→            }
   211→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   212→            Log.e("WhisperService", "Transcription error", e)
   213→            val errorMsg = when {
   214→                e.message?.contains("timeout", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   215→                    "❌ 请求超时\n\n网络连接超时，请检查网络连接后重试。"
   216→                e.message?.contains("Unable to resolve host", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   217→                e.message?.contains("UnknownHost", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   218→                    "❌ 网络连接失败\n\n无法连接到 Groq API 服务器，请检查网络连接。"
   219→                else -> "❌ 转录失败\n\n${e.message ?: "未知错误"}\n\n请检查网络连接和 API Key 配置后重试。"
   220→            }
   221→            WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   222→        }
   223→    }
   224→}

    21→/**
    22→ * 分段下载管理器
    23→ * 支持大文件分段下载和断点续传
    24→ *
    25→ * 功能特性：
    26→ * - 支持大文件（>100MB）分段下载
    27→ * - 改进的断点续传（包含校验和）
    28→ * - 详细的进度回调（分段信息、速度、剩余时间）
    29→ * - 并发下载优化
    30→ * - 增强的错误处理和重试机制
    31→ * - 支持取消下载
    32→ */
    33→@Singleton
    34→class SegmentedDownloader @Inject constructor() {
    35→
    36→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    37→        .connectTimeout(60, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    38→        .readTimeout(300, TimeUnit.SECONDS) // 5分钟读超时，适合大文件下载
    39→        .writeTimeout(300, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    40→        .build()
    41→
    42→    // 每个分段的大小（5MB）
    43→    private val SEGMENT_SIZE = 5L * 1024 * 1024
    44→
    45→    // 最小分段大小（1MB，小于此文件不分段）
    46→    private val MIN_SEGMENT_SIZE = 1L * 1024 * 1024
    47→
    48→    // 大文件阈值（100MB，超过此值使用更大的分段）
    49→    private val LARGE_FILE_THRESHOLD = 100L * 1024 * 1024
    50→
    51→    // 大文件分段大小（10MB）
    52→    private val LARGE_SEGMENT_SIZE = 10L * 1024 * 1024
    53→
    54→    // 最大并发下载数
    55→    private val MAX_CONCURRENT_DOWNLOADS = 4
    56→
    57→    // 最大重试次数
    58→    private val MAX_RETRY_COUNT = 5
    59→
    60→    // 最大分段数量
    61→    private val MAX_SEGMENT_COUNT = 20
    62→
    63→    /**
    64→     * 根据文件大小和网络状况计算最佳分段大小
    65→     * - 小文件（<50MB）：不分段
    66→     * - 中等文件（50-200MB）：5MB分段
    67→     * - 大文件（>200MB）：10MB分段
    68→     * - 超大文件（>500MB）：15MB分段
    69→     */
    70→    private fun calculateOptimalSegmentSize(fileSize: Long): Long {
    71→        return when {
    72→            fileSize < 50 * 1024 * 1024 -> fileSize // 不分段
    73→            fileSize < 200 * 1024 * 1024 -> 5 * 1024 * 1024
    74→            fileSize < 500 * 1024 * 1024 -> 10 * 1024 * 1024
    75→            else -> 15 * 1024 * 1024
    76→        }
    77→    }
    78→    // 重试延迟（毫秒）
    79→    private val RETRY_DELAY_MS = 3000L
    80→
    81→    // 当前下载的取消标志
    82→    private val currentCancellationFlag = AtomicBoolean(false)
    83→
    84→    // 下载速度采样窗口（用于动态调整分段大小）
    85→    private val speedSamples = mutableListOf<Long>()
    86→    private var lastSpeedUpdateTime = 0L
    87→
    88→    /**
    89→     * 下载进度回调

    91→    data class DownloadProgress(
    92→        val bytesDownloaded: Long,
    93→        val totalBytes: Long,
    94→        val percent: Int,

    97→        val totalSegments: Int, // 总分段数
    98→        val completedSegments: Set<Int>, // 已完成的分段索引集合
    99→        val currentSegmentBytes: Long = 0, // 当前分段已下载字节数
   100→        val currentSegmentTotal: Long = 0, // 当前分段总字节数
